evals.prompt: Split the frame into a 3-line header, a filling body, and a 1-line status bar; body split into a fixed 30-cell sidebar and a filling main area. Current Layout API.
Scrollable, selectable List backed by ListState with j/k nav and a Scrollbar driven by ScrollbarState.
Implement a wrapping, auto-following chat scrollback that the user can scroll up to pin. SYNCHRONOUS (no async): a VecDeque<Line> model + offset + visible-slice render.
rubric: owns VecDeque/Vec<Line> + tracked offset, NOT a giant Buffer
auto-follows bottom, freezes when scrolled up

evals.prompt: Feed the scrollback model from streaming deltas over a tokio mpsc channel; redraw on a render tick, not per delta.
Author a custom StatefulWidget and render it, choosing the right trait and reference idiom.
rubric: StatefulWidget (or Widget for &T) per current guidance
writes via Line/Span/set_*, not raw escapes
no unstable WidgetRef without noting the feature flag

evals.prompt: Render a paragraph containing CJK characters and emoji that wraps correctly at a given width and truncates with an ellipsis on one line.
rubric: uses display width (unicode-width), not char/byte count
Paragraph Wrap or manual width-aware wrapping

evals.prompt: Set up/tear down so the terminal always restores, including on panic, using the current API + color-eyre.
rubric: relies on init() panic hook or sets one that restores

evals.prompt: Regression check: generated code must not contain tui-rs-era patterns.
rubric: grep finds none of: enable_raw_mode (hand-rolled), EnterAlternateScreen (manual), StretchLast, SegmentSize, Constraint::Proportional, the cassowary crate (must be kasuari), bare Alignment for layout (use HorizontalAlignment)
